title: Quadrance Product FAIL: uses b**2 power notation instead of b*b product form
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture: expresses quadrances using power notation (b**2) instead of product form (b*b), violating S1 and the irreducible-product principle. Validator must detect the S1 violation.
source_attribution: Intentionally wrong fixture for validation testing.
fail_ledger: QP_S1: formula uses **2 power notation instead of b*b product form
QP_ROLE: factor roles are identical ('base'/'base') — not role-distinct
QP_PRODUCT: product table has only 1 element, need >= 6
